---
title: "RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime Command"
---

## Overview

`RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime` bridges Triage/command sequences to saved
TransformsV2 `PipelineDescriptor` JSON files. It is registered from
`src/TransformsV2/register_transformsv2_commands.cpp` and appears in
`CommandPickerDialog` via the shared `CommandRegistry`.

**Status:** Draft stub — validates `pipeline_path` and logs parameters; does not
yet subset DataManager, execute the pipeline, or merge output. Tracked in
[#267](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/267).

## Source Files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `src/TransformsV2/Commands/RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime.hpp` | Command + params struct |
| `src/TransformsV2/Commands/RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime.cpp` | Stub `execute()` |
| `src/TransformsV2/Commands/RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTimeUIHints.hpp` | `ParameterUIHints` (path browse for `pipeline_path`) |

## Parameters

```cpp
struct RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTimeParams {
    std::string input_key;
    std::string output_key;
    int64_t time = 0;  // sequence JSON may use "${current_frame}" / "${mark_frame}"
    std::string pipeline_path;
};
```

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `input_key` | DataManager key of the source object for the frame subset |
| `output_key` | DataManager key where results will be merged |
| `time` | Frame index; use `"${current_frame}"` or `"${mark_frame}"` in sequence JSON (expanded to a JSON number before deserialization, same as `ClearLineDataAtTime`) |
| `pipeline_path` | Absolute path to a pipeline JSON file (browse defaults to the user pipeline library) |

## UI Hints

`pipeline_path` uses `PathFieldKind::FilePath` with
`file_dialog_id = "transformv2_pipeline_open"`. `MainWindow` registers a
fallback directory via `AutoParamWidget::registerDialogFallback()` pointing at
`defaultUserPipelineDirectory(configDir())`, sharing session path memory with
`TransformsV2Properties_Widget`.

`input_key` and `output_key` set `dynamic_combo = true` for future runtime
population from DataManager keys in `CommandRowWidget`.

## Future Execution (not implemented)

1. Resolve `time` after variable substitution.
2. `createTemporalSubset` for `input_key` at that frame.
3. Run `TransformPipeline` from `PipelineDescriptor` off-DataManager.
4. `mergeOverwriteData` into `output_key` at the resolved time ([#269](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/269)).

## Related

- [Command Registration](../transforms_v2/command_registration.qmd)
- [Pipeline Library](../transforms_v2/pipeline_library.qmd)
- [Command Architecture](../../Commands/index.qmd)
